definition: if you can balance, you are able to stay standing up without falling over
example: Katia is still learning how to balance on skis.

definition: a signpost is a signal or a clue that links ideas
example: Signposts in conversation are useful in telling us what information to focus on.

definition: a genre is a category or group of something
example: The store also sells books of various genres.

definition: a postgraduate is a type of studying you do, like a masters or doctoral degree, after you get your first university degree
example: Abolfazi plans to start a postgraduate degree at university next year.

definition: if you donate something, you give money, food, clothes, etc. to an organization or charity
example: Yolyn is sorting out her clothes and will donate the clothes she no longer wants.

definition: if something goes viral, it is very popular and spreads very quickly across social media and the internet
example: If a video is funny, it goes viral very quickly.

definition: if you tag someone in something on social media, you add their name in a post or a photo so they can see it
example: Tag everyone in the photo when you put it on Instagram.

definition: if you embarrass someone, you make them feel nervous or silly
example: My mother likes to show my friends strange photos of me that embarrass me.

definition: a council is a formal group that governs an area in a city
example: The council is responsible for looking after the library.

definition: a muscle is a part of the body that connects to bones and helps us to move
example: After going to the gym for three hours, Tasha’s muscles were sore.

definition: rugby is a sport played by two teams with a ball shaped like an egg
example: Miraç and his friends like to play rugby on Saturday mornings.

definition: if you recover from something, you get better or healthy again
example: Aletta hopes to recover from her cold quickly.

definition: a limit is the biggest possible amount of something that is allowed
example: The team performed to the limit of its ability.

definition: a dry suit is like a big jacket that you wear in cold water that keeps all the water out
example: Wearing a dry suit can keep you warm in very cold water.

definition: if you trap something, it cannot move or escape from where you put it
example: I trapped my coat in the car door when I got out of the car.

definition: if you survive, you continue to live
example: People cannot survive for long without water.

definition: a person’s background is the type of family or social situation that they come from
example: I don’t know much about Alaric’s background.

definition: a marathon is a race you run that is longer than 40 km
example: Blair is training to run in a marathon next month.

definition: construction is the process of building something, like a building, road, or bridge
example: There has been a lot of construction in this city in the last 10 years.
